# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary
- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Changes Included
- [ ] Backend changes
- [ ] Frontend changes
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Configuration or environment changes

## Testing
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Verified no broken builds
- [ ] Checked for obvious UI issues

## Notes
- Add any deployment steps, database migrations, API key requirements, or special notes here.
